news.title: 从课程到洞穴晶体：六位UNI研究人员推动科学边界的边界
news.summary_en: Five UNI faculty members and one graduate student — representing fields from music and education to engineering and astrochemistry — have been awarded funding and support to advance early‑stage ideas through the university’s Intellectual Property and Innovation Disclosure Competition IV.
news.original_title: From curriculum to cave crystals: Six UNI researchers push boundaries with award‑winning innovations
news.summary_cn: 北爱荷华大学的六位研究人员正在通过跨学科合作推动科学边界的边界。他们的研究涵盖从课程开发到洞穴晶体形成的多个领域，展示了UNI在科学研究方面的卓越能力。这些研究不仅增进了学术知识，也为学生提供了宝贵的研究机会。
